title: Configuring ROS 2 Colcon Workspace from Scratch
description: In this video walkthrough, we show you how to properly initialize a ROS 2 workspace, configure packages, and write your first publisher/subscriber in C++ and Python.
speaker: Dr. Sarah Miller

title: 6-DOF Robotic Arm Inverse Kinematics & Calibration Demo
description: Watch our custom 3D-printed 6-DOF arm perform high-precision pick and place operations. We explain our calibration method to resolve mechanical offsets.
speaker: Marcus Thorne

title: Real-time 3D Point Cloud Generation via Stereo Vision
description: A demonstration of our autonomous rover platform navigating an obstacle course using stereo cameras to compute depth maps and generate occupancy grids in real time.
speaker: Elena Rostova
